entities.name: Google Drive
entities.context: Cloud storage platform where feedback documents are synced via google_drive-create-file-from-text tool

entities.name: zo_feedback.db
entities.context: SQLite database at N5/data/ storing feedback records, attachments metadata, and sync status

entities.name: Zo Feedback
entities.context: Feedback collection system with status workflow (new→sent→resolved), types (bug/improvement/question/glitch), and severity levels

relationships.context: Feedback items sync to Google Drive as documents with title format [Zo Feedback] {title} - {feedback_id}
Feedback records and attachments stored in SQLite database with status tracking
